creator: fluffy@Fluffy.Khv.RU
text:
Hello!

>  >Number:         152432
>  >Category:       ports
>  >Synopsis:       Kopete refuses connect to ICQ after telepathy-qt4 upgrade
>  >Description:
>  After the update of net-im/telepathy-qt4 and subsequent version bump of net/kdenetwork4 about a week ago, Kopete seems to be unable to connect to ICQ. It > reports the password is wrong even though it definitely isnât and I am still able to connect using other clients. Judging from a comparison of the OSCAR âsignonâ > packages using wireshark, Kopete fails to even send _any_ password hash. The upgrade of telepathy-qt4 seems to be the only thing that could have caused   
> this. Can anyone confirm something similar?

It's caused by recent icq changes - login servers moved from  login.oscar.aol.com to login.icq.com
Any ICQ client now may refuse to connect

Anyway, kde trunk now has a solution, will be ported.


--
